You can't miss this one . It's a lonley Apple tree next to the road. ripe but tastes like crud. mealy and bitter . would make a good apples for your goat. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.

6 mature hazelnut bushes  from farmstead back in the 30's. Located next to S.S. Speedway. Owner says to pick as much as ya want. Just don't leave trash. Access: Permitted by owner. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
Young tree, put on a reasonable amount of fruit this year. Access: Public.
